questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in passive voice.
Give her a 50% raise in salary.

options.text: Let her being given a 50% raise in salary.
She should give a 50% raise in salary.
She should have given a 50% raise in salary.
Let her be given a 50% raise in salary.

questions.question_text_full:
Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph.
A. The first is far more real than the second.
B. But, a person who enjoys long distance popularity succeeds in creating a favourable notion of himself among unknown people.
C. An intimately popular person is liked by those who know him.
D. There are two kinds of popularity - intimate and long distance popularity.

options.text: CBDA
DACB
CABD
DCAB

questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in reported speech.
The captain announced, "The flight will be delayed due to bad weather."

options.text: The captain announced that the flight will be delayed due to bad weather.
The captain announced that the fight was delayed due to bad weather.
The captain announced that the flight would be delayed due to bad weather.
The captain announced that the flight would be delay due to bad weather.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank.
Have you ________________ with the difficulties you might have to face?

options.text: considered
reckoned
discussed
pondered

questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in reported speech.
The children said to the nurse, "Reema slipped and fell from the stairs."

options.text: The children told the nurse that Reema had slipped and fallen from the stairs.
The children told to the nurse that Reema slipped and fallen from the stairs.
The children told the nurse Reema has slipped and fallen from the stairs.
The children told the nurse that Reema slipped and fell from the stairs.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in passive voice.
Have you placed an order for a cake?

options.text: Have an order for a cake been placed by you?
Was an order for a cake placed by you?
Has an order for a cake been placed by you?
Is an order for a cake being placed by you?
